summary: Comprehensive testing of HoneyGroove vault rename (Collection → The Vault), Re-pollinate button relocation (Profile → Daily Prompt), Download App button in Settings, and Essential Six filters. All features verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working. Collection→The Vault rename complete across desktop nav, mobile nav, page heading, tabs, search placeholder, value header, and add button. Re-pollinate button correctly moved from ProfilePage to DailyPrompt card with conditional logic (only shows when gap > 24hrs AND < 72hrs). Download App card permanently added to Settings page.

treasury_header_vault_value.details: Treasury header shows 'VAULT VALUE $7,886' (confirmed via screenshot)

add_button_vault_text.details: Add button shows 'Add to Your Vault' (data-testid='add-record-btn')

repollinate_removed_from_profile.details: Re-pollinate button (data-testid='repollinate-btn') correctly NOT present on profile page

repollinate_in_daily_prompt.details: Re-pollinate button code exists in DailyPrompt.js (lines 240-275) with correct conditional logic: only shows when (now - last_spin_date) > 24hrs AND < 72hrs. For Katie's account, streak is active (last_spin_date < 24hrs ago), so button correctly not visible.

download_app_card_settings.details: Download App card (data-testid='download-app-card') present in Settings with button (data-testid='download-app-btn') showing 'Download The Honey Groove App!'

essential_six_filters.details: All 6 filters present: 🍯 All (filter-all), 🐝 Now Spinning (filter-NOW_SPINNING), 🔍 ISO (filter-ISO), 📦 Haul (filter-NEW_HAUL), 📝 Notes (filter-NOTE), 🏷️ For Sale/Trade (filter-listing)

backend_last_spin_date.details: API /api/auth/login returns last_spin_date field correctly (e.g., '2026-03-12T19:55:07.105651+00:00' for Katie)
